# Top Home Renovations

> Top Home Renovations serves Lilburn, GA and the surrounding area (Lilburn, Lawrenceville, Snellville, Tucker). Call +12818273033.

## Services

- [Painting](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/painting)
- [Drywall & Tile](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/drywall-tile)
- [Electrical & Fixtures](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/electrical-fixtures)

- [Cleaning & Gutters](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/cleaning-gutters)
- [Remodeling & Renovations](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/remodeling)

- [Home Maintenance & Repairs](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/repairs-flooring/home-maintenance)

- [Furniture Assembly](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/repairs-flooring/furniture-assembly)
- [TV Mounting](https://tophomerenovations.com/services/repairs-flooring/tv-mounting)
